scripts.api:fix: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const glob=require('path'); const files=['src/app/api/orders/route.ts','src/app/api/admin/orders/[id]/route.ts','src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts','src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts']; files.forEach(f=>{if(fs.existsSync(f)){const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'); fs.writeFileSync(f, c.replace(/\"force-dynamic\"/g, '\"force-static\"'))}})"
scripts.api:reset: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['src/app/api/orders/route.ts','src/app/api/admin/orders/[id]/route.ts','src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts','src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts']; files.forEach(f=>{if(fs.existsSync(f)){const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'); fs.writeFileSync(f, c.replace(/\"force-static\"/g, '\"force-dynamic\"'))}})"
scripts.build:mobile: npm run api:fix && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_IS_MOBILE=true next build && npm run api:reset && npx cap sync
